title: A New Enemy Network Moves
description: On pages 20–23, this part focuses on a new enemy network moves, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: A New Enemy Network Moves. After leaving Drum, the crew heads deeper into Alabasta’s conflict while the desert kingdom’s danger comes into view. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How was it? My hidden talents!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This isn't something I ordinarily show to others, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Bravo! Bravo!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Stoop JOOKING AROUND!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He did, "I'd

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Stoop JOOKING AROUND!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Yeah... You guys just keep doing whatever the hell you want.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Hey! There's a ship coming this way.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Could that be your ship?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Over there!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Oh phooie, time to part ways already? What a pity...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Whaaaat!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't cry, my silly billies. Farewells are an inevitable thing if you sail the seas! But remember this!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: The length of time spent together,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Has no bearing on true friendship!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's meet again someday!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let us be off!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Yes sir, Mr. 2 Bon Kurei!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Viv!! You weren't aware of how he looked like!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: I'm afraid not... I've never met Mr. 2 or Mr. 1 and his partner...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I also don't know about their abilities...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: But I have heard rumours about Mr. 2...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: That he looks and talks like an extremely flamboyant okama, and wears a swan coat that reads "Okama Way" on the back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You really, really, really should've realized it sooner.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: When he was showing off all the faces he memorized, I noticed that one of the people was my father...!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Just what on earth... Has he been using my father's face for...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...If a guy like him could transform into the King of Alabasta,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Then there's a whole lot of damage he could do...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Seems we let a dangerous one slip past our fingers.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He was an enemy...?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Yes... He's quite a troublesome enemy to face...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If he realizes that we were his enemies...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Then with that memory skill, he'll be able to change into any one of us... Making us unable to trust each other anymore.

summary: This part highlights a new enemy network moves and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
